title: Verilog preprocessor line directives not always honored

features.name: line directive after include directive
features.description: Code should include a `line preprocessor directive to set a custom filename and line number, followed by a `include directive, followed by code that relies on the line directive being honored after returning from the included file

features.name: line directive after multi-line macro expansion
features.description: Code should include a `line preprocessor directive to set a custom filename and line number, followed by a multi-line macro definition using backslash line continuation, followed by code that relies on the line directive being honored after the macro expansion
